---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an improvement or new feature
title: ''
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

**What problem does this solve?**
A clear description of the problem or gap.

**Proposed solution**
How you'd solve it. Be specific – code snippets, mockups, or references welcome.

**Alternatives considered**
Other approaches you thought about and why you didn't pick them.

**Additional context**
Anything else – screenshots, links, related issues.
